title: Subunit selective modulation of GABAA receptors using pharmacogenetically tethered neurosteroids
abstract: Engineered neurosteroid DART platform for cell-restricted, subunit-resolved GABAA receptor modulation. Lead compound YX85.1DART.2 enhanced GABA-evoked currents in alpha4/delta-containing GABAA receptors but spared gamma2-containing receptors. Complementary benzodiazepine DART showed opposite selectivity. Tools enable dissection of how distinct GABAA receptor subclasses contribute to circuit function and therapeutic outcomes in epilepsy.
